section.div: Curated list of the best truly open-source AI projects, models, tools, and infrastructure.
A fast, helpful, and open-source document parser
SQLite VFS with sub-100ms cold JOIN queries from S3 + page-level compression and encryption
Kubernetes controller for GitHub Actions self-hosted runners
Give AI coding agents eyes. Records browser sessions, captures screenshots, collects errors, and bundles proof artifacts — so humans can verify what the agent built.
A curated list of AutoResearch use cases and open source implementations
reference impl with llama.cpp compiled to distributed inference across machines, with real end to end demo
A modern static site generator by the Material for MkDocs team
Local API emulation for CI and no-network sandboxes
A variety of custom ComfyUI nodes and workflows
Share your linux or osx terminal over the Internet.
Transit Relay server for Magic-Wormhole
the rendezvous/mailbox server for magic-wormhole clients
Run OpenClaw more securely inside NVIDIA OpenShell with managed inference
🤱🏻 Turn any webpage into a desktop app with one command.
Forward over Wormhole: streams over magic-wormhole Dilation connections
Production toolkit for running GitNexus at scale — 26 repos, 43K symbols, 100K edges, zero data loss. Docker, cron, AI agent integration. Featured in GitNexus Community Integrations.
AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.
Build and deploy AI Agents on Cloudflare
Bash for Agents
Vite plugin that reimplements the Next.js API surface — deploy anywhere
DO NOT CHECK OUT THESE FILES FROM GITHUB UNLESS YOU KNOW WHAT YOU ARE DOING. (See below.)
An autonomous novel writing pipeline, by Hermes Agent
Beads - A memory upgrade for your coding agent
A meeting note-taker that talks back.

Command Your AI Agent Empire from the CEO Desk — A local-first AI agent office simulator that orchestrates CLI, OAuth, and API-connected agents (Claude Code, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, OpenCode, and more) as a virtual autonomous company.
8-layer defense-in-depth security for agentic AI. Covers OWASP ASI Top 10 across ingestion, storage, context, planning, execution, output, inter-agent, and identity layers.
DSPy: The framework for programming—not prompting—language models
Multi-language structured logging (TypeScript, Python, Rust, Go) for AWS Lambda and browser — correlation tracking, automatic context gathering, and a Rust/egui desktop log viewer.
A Better Secrets Scanner built for configurability and speed
High-performance browser automation bridge and multi-instance orchestrator with advanced stealth injection and real-time dashboard.
LLM Architecture Gallery source data
OpenClaw for Teams
Turn any MCP, OpenAPI, or GraphQL server into a CLI — at runtime, with zero codegen

For people who get distracted by agents. A native Rust/GPUI control plane for running Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and OpenCode side by side — because if you're going to be squirrely, you might as well optimize for it.
A step-by-step guide to build your own AI agent.

Dimensional is the agentic operating system for physical space. Vibecode humanoids, quadrupeds, drones, and other hardware platforms in natural language and build multi-agent systems that work seamlessly with physical input (cameras, lidar, actuators).
A computer you can curl ⚡
Pixel office.
A Python library to RDAP WHOIS-like services for internet resources such as ASNs, IPs, CIDRs and domains
Jurassic Park Unix System style Kubernetes resource viewer
An anonymous & ephemeral Docker image registry
Google Workspace CLI — one command-line tool for Drive, Gmail, Calendar, Sheets, Docs, Chat, Admin, and more. Dynamically built from Google Discovery Service. Includes AI agent skills.
Serve a directory of Markdown files as rendered HTML - with directory listings, YAML front matter, breadcrumb navigation, and customisable Handlebars templates.
Run agentic coding workflows in a fully native desktop app for Git worktrees, terminals, and diffs.
🚀 PR Agent - The Original Open-Source PR Reviewer. This repo is not the Qodo free tier! Try the free version on our website.
Stateless video/image rendering engine with JSON templates and React component support
A curated list of awesome video frameworks, libraries, specifications and software.
AI agents running research on single-GPU nanochat training automatically
Open Source Speech Language Model
Minecraft-style voxel benchmark for comparing AI models (Arena + Sandbox)
Agent harness to make your slop code well-engineered and beautiful.
Multi-agent orchestration for AI coding agents — pluggable runtime adapters for Claude Code, Pi, and more
Fast, small, and fully autonomous AI personal assistant infrastructure, ANY OS, ANY PLATFORM — deploy anywhere, swap anything 🦀
OBLITERATE THE CHAINS THAT BIND YOU
The agent that grows with you
AoE2 Britons voice pack for peon-ping — monk, villager & wololo sounds for Claude Code
EVE (Wall-E) sound pack for PeonPing
Friends sound pack for OpenPeon/PeonPing
20 movie quote sound packs for PeonPing (CESP v1.0) — Big Lebowski, Office Space, Anchorman, Blues Brothers, Starship Troopers, Super Troopers, Zoolander
Hooking implementations and supporting tools for various coding agents (Claude, Cursor, Gemini, etc)
Demos, examples and utilities using PyMuPDF
A basic but usable python script to look at x509 certificates
Bridge Claude Code / Codex to IM platforms — chat with AI coding agents from Telegram, Discord, or Feishu/Lark.
An open-source, self-hosted AI code review bot powered by Vercel.
An open-source Collaborative Multi-Agent OS for transparent, human-in-the-loop task coordination via Matrix rooms.
A quick demo of how fast your web server will start getting vigorously probed once you request a certificate
Design engineering for Claude Code. Craft, memory, and enforcement for consistent UI.
Beautiful & consistent icon toolkit made by the community. Open-source project and a fork of Feather Icons.
Agent skill that generates rich HTML pages or slide decks for diagrams, diff reviews, plan audits, data tables, and project recaps

Security proxy for AI agents. Scans every message for prompt injection, PII, and secrets. Defense-in-depth: Go proxy + iptables firewall + eBPF kernel monitor. YAML policy engine, audit logging, 5 AI agents with RAG knowledge bases.
π RuView: WiFi DensePose turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time human pose estimation, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.

Bridge local AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Gemini CLI, Codex) to messaging platforms (Feishu/Lark, DingTalk, Slack, Telegram, Discord, LINE, WeChat Work). Chat with your AI dev assistant from anywhere — no public IP required for most platforms.
🐾 One-command multi-agent setup for OpenClaw — 9 specialized AI agents, group routing, safe config merge.
Real-time global intelligence dashboard. AI-powered news aggregation, geopolitical monitoring, and infrastructure tracking in a unified situational awareness interface
the only cheat sheet you need
Apps for the Cheap Yellow Display
Control esp cyd with mcp
Cheap Yellow Display System Monitor using Glances API

Board definitions for the Sunton Smart display boards (CYD Cheap Yellow Display). These definitions contain not only contain the CPU information but also the connections and devices present on the board.
Online Tuya Devices Manager for Cheap Yellow Display (CYD) boards.
Interactive fluid simulation using the "CYD" dev board, featuring an ESP32. Built in Arduino.
ESP32 (CYD) kernel based firmware with 'penetration testing' packeges.
Staggeringly powerful macOS desktop automation with Lua
Your Personal AI Assistant; easy to install, deploy on your own machine or on the cloud; supports multiple chat apps with easily extensible capabilities.
A desktop GUI for Claude Code — chat, code, and manage projects visually. Built with Electron + Next.js.
Agentic orchestrator for parallel coding agents — plans tasks, spawns agents, and autonomously handles CI fixes, merge conflicts, and code reviews.
LVGL PlatformIO template for CYD variants
